name: SOUNDHOUND AI, INC.
summary: SoundHound AI, Inc. is a global leader in conversational intelligence offering independent Voice AI solutions. The company provides businesses with AI-driven products including Smart Answering, Smart Ordering, Dynamic Interaction, Employee Assist, and SoundHound Chat AI. Built on proprietary Speech-to-Meaning and Deep Meaning Understanding technologies, SoundHound serves automotive, TV, IoT, and customer service industries, processing billions of interactions annually for enterprise clients via its Houndify developer platform.
